---
title: ""
output:
  html_document:
    theme: null
    highlight: null
    toc: false
    self_contained: true
---

<style>
body {
  font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Inter, sans-serif;
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #111;
  max-width: 640px;
  margin: 120px auto;
  padding: 0 24px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

h1 {
  font-size: 32px;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  letter-spacing: -0.02em;
}

p {
  font-size: 18px;
  color: #444;
  margin: 12px 0;
}

a {
  color: #111;
  text-decoration: none;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc;
  transition: border-color 0.2s ease;
}

a:hover {
  border-color: #111;
}

.section {
  margin-top: 32px;
}

.muted {
  color: #777;
  font-size: 15px;
}

hr {
  border: none;
  border-top: 1px solid #eee;
  margin: 40px 0;
}
</style>

# Martin Haringa

Actuarial pricing — structured, interpretable, and implementable.

<div class="section">
<p class="muted">Work</p>

[insurancerating](https://github.com/MHaringa/insurancerating)  
<span class="muted">Framework for insurance pricing in R</span>
</div>

<div class="section">
<p class="muted">Documentation</p>

[Package site](/insurancerating/)
</div>

---

<span class="muted">Built with R and GitHub Pages</span>
